changes: An issue wherein the description for the bard PvE action Barrage listed the incorrect potency for Shadowbite was resolved (text-only issue).
An issue wherein an action that cannot be executed or set to the hotbar appeared in the Actions & Traits window was resolved.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration
new_content.description: Large-scale gameplay for Disciples of the Hand and Land involving exploration of the cosmos, base camp development, and stellar missions.

new_content.name: A Cosmic Homecoming
new_content.description: Quest to unlock Cosmic Exploration content.

new_content.name: Cosmic Tools
new_content.description: Class-specific tool enhancement system for Disciples of the Hand and Land obtained via Cosmic Exploration.

new_content.name: Mech Ops
new_content.description: Large-scale directives in Sinus Ardorum where players act as pilots or ground support to complete objectives.

new_content.name: Cosmic Fortunes
new_content.description: Roulette-style system to earn prizes using Lunar Credits or tickets.

housing.name: Stellar Lamppost
housing.description: Though this piece of illuminating infrastructure has been specially designed to function in the icy vacuum of space, it is still not rated for licking.

housing.name: Cosmochair
housing.description: An interstellar travel-ready seat with a futuristic─yet still appropriately leporine─design.

housing.name: Drafting Table
housing.description: A slanted desk suited for drawing up engineering designs.

housing.name: Cosmotable
housing.description: This furnishing is designed to minimize the possibility of spills in low-gravity environments. Unfortunately, technology capable of compensating entirely for Loporrit error remains far in the future.

housing.name: Cosmolamp
housing.description: An energy-efficient lighting appliance with a design reminiscent of a solar system.

glamour.name: Star Crew Jacket
glamour.description: Body piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Star Crew Gloves
glamour.description: Hands piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Star Crew Trousers
glamour.description: Legs piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Star Crew Boots
glamour.description: Feet piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Cosmosuit Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a complete cosmosuit.
